news.headline: ECB's Villeroy: The ECB is not behind the curve but risk of cutting rates too late bigger than cutting early.
ECB's Villeroy: Inflation could be at target in early 2025.
ECB's Villeroy: The economy is still on course for soft landing but no take off is in sight.
Gen Z poll shows bipartisan support for criminal justice reform, Jay-Z & Meek Mill's REFORM Alliance initiates Gen Z network for change.
news.summary: As the 2024 election approaches in two weeks, Jay-Z and Meek Mill's REFORM Alliance have unveiled a Gen Z poll and introduced the Future Shapers Network, consisting of Gen Z leaders and organizations. The initiative aims to enhance policy changes across the nation. The poll results and network launch were revealed in New York on October 22, 2024.

news.headline: Cousins Maine Lobster expands in West Texas with new franchisees opening in Lubbock, TX. Multi-unit deal signed. #Growth
news.summary: In South Portland, Maine on October 22, 2024, Cousins Maine Lobster revealed a significant agreement involving multiple years and units, with newcomers Chris Wilson and Gary Andrews from Lubbock, TX. The renowned brand, recognized for attracting large audiences through its globally acclaimed lobster rolls...

news.headline: ExxonMobil will release Q3 2024 financial results on Nov 1, 2024, with key executives providing a live review.
news.summary: In Spring, Texas, Exxon Mobil Corporation (NYSE: XOM) is set to unveil its third quarter 2024 financial outcomes on November 1, 2024. The announcement will be made through a press release on Business Wire at 5:30 a.m. CT, accessible at investor.exxonmobil.com. The review of the results will be conducted live by key executives, including Darren Woods, Chairman and CEO; Kathy Mikells, Senior VP and CFO; and Jim Chapman, VP, Treasurer, and Investor Relations.

news.headline: Billionaire Bitcoin believer, Paul Tudor Jones, foresees inflation due to rising U.S. federal debt, drives him to invest in cryptocurrency.
news.summary: Investor Paul Tudor Jones, a billionaire, expresses concern over the U.S. federal debt, foreseeing inflation on the horizon. He has placed his bet on Bitcoin as a strategic move in response to this rising issue.

news.headline: Lagarde suggests Trump witness Fed's challenges first-hand to understand the magnitude of responsibilities.
ECB's Villeroy: Inflation persistence is no longer sole, dominant risk.
ECB's Villeroy: There is a risk that inflation undershoots 2% target, especially if growth weak.
OneTrust named a leader in Snowflake's Modern Marketing Data Stack Report for their Consent Management solution.
news.summary: OneTrust's Consent Management platform empowers users to utilize data and AI ethically on Snowflake's AI Data Cloud. The company, which is a leader in supporting responsible data and AI utilization, disclosed today that it has earned recognition.

news.headline: Gatemore Capital Management presents Watches of Switzerland Group at 13D Monitor Active-Passive Investor Summit in NYC.
news.summary: On October 22, 2024, Gatemore Capital Management revealed its involvement in the Lightning Round at the 13D Monitor Active-Passive Investor Summit. They highlighted Watches of Switzerland Group PLC, a global retailer.

news.headline: Charm Pratt named COO at Intellivo.
news.summary: In a recent update, it has been reported that a total of 1,500 employees in the company will be facing layoffs due to financial challenges. The decision comes as the company aims to reduce costs and restructure operations in response to a decline in revenue. The layoffs are expected to affect various departments across the organization, with approximately 500 positions being cut in the marketing and sales divisions, while another 700 employees will be let go from production and manufacturing roles. The remaining 300 job cuts will come from administrative and support staff. The company has stated that severance packages and outplacement services will be provided to those impacted by the layoffs. This move is part of the company's efforts to streamline its workforce and improve efficiency in the face of economic pressures.

news.headline: Billionaire Paul Tudor Jones predicts inflation due to U.S. federal debt, investing in Bitcoin.
news.summary: Renowned billionaire investor Paul Tudor Jones expressed concerns over the escalating U.S. federal debt, predicting an imminent rise in inflation. To hedge against this risk, he is placing his bets on Bitcoin, a move that reflects his apprehension about the economic landscape. Jones' strategic maneuver underscores the significance of addressing the mounting federal debt crisis, as it could potentially trigger a surge in inflation rates. The investor's pivot towards Bitcoin signifies a shift in investment strategies among prominent figures in the financial world, further emphasizing the growing impact of digital currencies on traditional markets.

news.headline: Monoline partners with Advantage Partners Independent Agent Network; revolutionizes personal umbrella policy placement with innovative online platform.
news.summary: In Minnetonka, Minnesota on October 22, 2024, Monoline, a tech-based insurance company transforming personal umbrella policy placement, revealed a new collaboration with Advantage Partners Independent Agent Network. The partnership will leverage Monoline's cutting-edge online platform for smoother...

news.headline: ASML becomes focal point in contentious European debates.
Chipotle partners with Paradox to streamline hiring process at 3,500+ locations, reducing recruitment time by 75%.
news.summary: Chipotle Mexican Grill, Inc. (NYSE:CMG) has announced a collaboration with Paradox to enhance the hiring process for its restaurant teams. Through Paradox’s AI-powered platform, administrative burdens on General Managers will be reduced, enabling them to prioritize daily operations and guest service. The partnership aims to significantly decrease hiring timelines for in-restaurant roles by a substantial 75%. The implementation of Paradox will be conducted gradually across Chipotle's network of more than 3,500 locations, with complete integration anticipated in the near future.

news.headline: Nike extends partnership with NBA and WNBA for 12 years, providing on-court uniforms, new content initiatives, and joint membership program.
news.summary: Nike, Inc. announced a 12-year extension of its partnership with the NBA and WNBA, solidifying its exclusive provider status for on-court uniforms in these leagues. The renewal also encompasses the NBA G League. The agreement involves new content projects and a collaborative membership program for fans, providing access to unique products, content, and experiences. This extends the existing eight-year global partnership between the parties.

news.headline: CrowdStrike and Fortinet partner for enhanced cybersecurity with Falcon platform and FortiGate NGFW, offering unified threat protection and response.
news.summary: CrowdStrike Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: CRWD) has collaborated with Fortinet, Inc. (NASDAQ: FTNT) to strengthen endpoint and firewall security. By combining CrowdStrike’s AI-native security from the Falcon platform with FortiGate next-generation firewalls (NGFW), the partnership aims to provide heightened protection. This integration allows for thorough telemetry across endpoints and networks, facilitating quick, AI-driven threat detection and response. Additionally, it streamlines security operations by offering a consolidated view. This strategic partnership between CrowdStrike and Fortinet is geared towards enhancing overall cybersecurity measures.

news.headline: Former Abercrombie CEO Michael Jeffries faces sex-trafficking charges, accused of coercing dozens of men for sex acts.
news.summary: The prosecution revealed that a significant number of individuals, approximately dozens of men, have made allegations against Michael Jeffries and two additional individuals. The accusers claim that they were pressured into engaging in sexual activities during Mr. Jeffries's time at the organization.

news.headline: Vornado Realty Trust will release its Q3 earnings on Nov 4, 2024, with conference call on Nov 5 at 10:00 a.m. ET.
news.summary: On October 22, 2024, Vornado Realty Trust (NYSE: VNO) revealed plans to submit its quarterly report for Q3 of 2024 on Form 10-Q to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission. The report will be released on Monday, November 4, 2024, post the closure of the New York Stock Exchange. Additionally, the company is set to hold a quarterly earnings conference call and audio webcast on Tuesday, November 5, 2024, at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time (ET).

news.headline: Senior Medicare Patrol leader testifies before Senate on scam prevention for older adults; highlights vital work of Agencies.
news.summary: On September 19, 2024, Nancy Gilmer Moore, the program director of the Indiana Association of Area Agencies on Aging, gave testimony in Washington, D.C. before the Senate Special Committee on Aging. She emphasized the significant role played by Area Agencies on Aging in supporting the elderly population. This testimony took place in Indianapolis, and it highlighted the crucial services and assistance provided by these agencies for seniors in Indiana.

news.headline: Allison Worldwide launches AIM, an AI-driven issues management offering to monitor and respond to social media conversations about businesses. #AI #PR #BrandManagement
news.summary: A new offering called Allison Advanced Issues Monitor (AIM) has been introduced by Allison Worldwide in San Francisco. This cutting-edge tool is designed to assist leaders in monitoring, analyzing, and responding to discussions concerning their businesses. Developed through Allison's innovation hub, SparkWorks, AIM utilizes advanced technology, such as artificial intelligence (AI), to analyze real-time social media conversations. It scans and interprets sentiment trends and emerging narratives to provide actionable insights tailored to individual businesses. This new tool aims to provide businesses with a strategic edge by keeping them informed about relevant discussions.

news.headline: Hart Howerton's 2025 Travel Fellowship Program is open to students in various design fields. Apply now!
news.summary: In a press release dated October 22, 2024, design company Hart Howerton revealed details about its upcoming 2025 Travel Fellowship Program. The program is aimed at undergraduate and graduate students studying fields such as planning, architecture, landscape architecture, urban design, and interior design. This initiative is a prestigious opportunity for students to gain valuable experience and exposure in their respective fields.

news.headline: Coca-Cola (KO) to report Q3 earnings before Oct. 23; Exp. revenue $11.60B with 74 cents EPS, maintaining a streak.
news.summary: Coca-Cola, a leading beverage company listed on the NYSE under the ticker KO, will announce its third-quarter financial results on Wednesday, October 23. Analysts anticipate the company to reveal third-quarter revenues of $11.60 billion, slightly lower than last year's $11.95 billion. Notably, Coca-Cola has surpassed revenue predictions for over 10 consecutive quarters. Earnings per share for the third quarter are projected at 74 cents, matching the figure from the same period last year. The company has exceeded earnings per share forecasts in eight of the last 10 quarters, meeting expectations in the other two. The full article is accessible on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: FHLBank Chicago reports Q3 2024 financial highlights; focuses on equitable homeownership, offers innovative programs.
news.summary: In Chicago, the Federal Home Loan Bank of Chicago (FHLBank Chicago) disclosed its preliminary financial outcomes for the third quarter of 2024. The organization emphasized its ongoing financial robustness, allowing for the introduction of new products and initiatives aimed at tackling obstacles to fair homeownership and the accessibility of affordable housing in collaboration with member financial institutions. According to the statement by Michael Ericson, president and CEO, this quarter's results demonstrate the bank's commitment to promoting equitable housing opportunities.

news.headline: ILHA to host INSPIRE Luxury Hospitality Conference in Las Vegas on Dec 4-5, 2024, at Fontainebleau.
news.summary: A prestigious event, the INSPIRE Luxury Hospitality Conference is being organized by the International Luxury Hotel Association (ILHA) on December 4-5, 2024, at Fontainebleau Las Vegas in Palm Beach Gardens, Fla. This conference is highly anticipated and is expected to gather industry professionals and experts in luxury hospitality.

news.headline: Hightouch named a Customer Data Platform Leader in Snowflake's Modern Marketing Data Stack 2025 Report.
news.summary: In San Francisco on October 22, 2024, Hightouch revealed that Snowflake customers are utilizing their services to convert the AI Data Cloud into a potent marketing tool for boosting growth. Hightouch was acknowledged as a leading Customer Data Platform in the Modern Marketing Data Stack report for 2025. This accreditation underscores the increasing use of data-driven strategies in marketing, indicating a shift towards more personalized and efficient marketing techniques. Such innovative approaches have enabled companies to tap into the power of data to drive expansion and enhance customer understanding, showcasing the evolving landscape of modern marketing practices.

news.headline: Stocks drop as caution prevails due to U.S. election proximity. GM up, gold sets records, silver hits 12-year high. Gold up 34% in 2020.
news.summary: Wall Street saw a second day of decline as caution grew ahead of the U.S. presidential election. The IMF raised U.S. growth forecasts for 2024 and 2025 but warned about the country's rising debt trajectory. Commodity markets performed well on Tuesday, with gold rising 0.8%, reaching record levels and showing a 34% increase year-to-date, on track for its strongest annual gain since 1979. Gold miners, represented by the VanEck Gold Miners ETF, also saw gains for the ninth consecutive session, hitting four-year highs. Silver, tracked by the iShares Silver Trust, surged 2.8%, hitting levels unseen since October.

news.headline: Acme United Corporation to give presentation at LD Micro Main Event XVII on October 29, at 10:30 AM PT.
news.summary: A presentation is scheduled for Tuesday, October 29 at 10:30 AM PT.

news.headline: Cavco Industries releases 2024 Environmental, Social & Governance report, highlighting commitment to affordable housing, sustainability, and governance.
news.summary: Cavco Industries has released its 2024 Environmental, Social, and Governance Report, highlighting its commitment to providing affordable housing solutions, promoting environmental sustainability, and maintaining transparent governance practices. The report underscores the company's focus on these key areas moving forward.

news.headline: 60 counterparties take $237.760b at Fed Reverse Repo Operation.
Similarweb named leader in Snowflake's Modern Marketing Data Stack Report for 2025, excelling in Enrichment & Hygiene.
news.summary: Similarweb has recently been acknowledged as a leader in the Modern Marketing Data Stack 2025 in a report by Snowflake, the AI Data Cloud company. Specifically, Similarweb was highlighted in the Enrichment & Hygiene category for its expertise in enriching and validating digital market data. This recognition comes as part of Snowflake's annual report on how leading marketers are succeeding in a world shaped by AI, privacy, and data gravity.

news.headline: BiltOn secures $15M Series B funding, rebrands from Beti to enhance construction ops software, reduce insurance claims.
news.summary: A prominent construction operations and risk management software company, BiltOn, based in New York, recently revealed its significant expansion on a national scale. The company raised an impressive $15 million in a Series B funding round. In addition to this financial success, BiltOn also unveiled a revamped brand identity, which encompasses an enriched set of platform features.

news.headline: NAMM NeXT 2025 in Nashville to unite music industry, focusing on business, tech, networking. Event website next.namm.org.
news.summary: Following the resounding success of the inaugural event this year, the 2025 Two-Day Summit is set to return with a focus on business, technology trends, networking, marketing, and entrepreneurship. The event will take place in 2025 and those interested can find more information on the NAMM NeXT website at next.namm.org. The event will be held in CARLSBAD, California and the announcement was made on October 22, 2024.

news.headline: Tourmaline & Clean Energy open 2 new CNG stations in Alberta, building Canada's 1st public CNG fueling network.
news.summary: Tourmaline Oil Corp (TSX: TOU) and Clean Energy Fuels Corp (NASDAQ: CLNE) have launched two new compressed natural gas (CNG) fueling stations in Alberta, a significant step in establishing Western Canada's initial public CNG fueling network. The new stations in Calgary and Grande Prairie, combined with the Edmonton station opened in April 2023, form a pivotal part of this endeavor. These initiatives demonstrate a commitment to sustainability and reducing carbon emissions by offering cleaner fuel options to the public.

news.headline: Portoula debuts new collection of shawls & scarves in Boston on Oct. 22, 2024, made from organic cotton, wool, and silk.
news.summary: On October 22, 2024, in Boston, the company Portoula unveiled new designs within their collection of shawls and scarves sourced from Greece. The pieces are made from high-quality organic cotton and embellished with hand-felted wool and silk.

news.headline: Carbon Ridge secures $9.5M to fast-track maritime shipping industry decarbonization efforts.
news.summary: A recent development in Los Angeles sees Carbon Ridge securing a $9.5 million investment to expedite the decarbonization efforts within the maritime shipping sector. This significant financial backing aims to propel the reduction of carbon emissions within the industry and advance sustainable practices. Known for its focus on carbon capture technology, Carbon Ridge's latest investment signals a strong push towards combating environmental issues in the maritime sector.

news.headline: Acxiom named leader in Snowflake's Modern Marketing Data Stack report. Key points: recognized as a leader, report by Snowflake, technologies used.
news.summary: Acxiom, a prominent player in customer intelligence and marketing solutions, has been acknowledged as a frontrunner in the Modern Marketing Data Stack 2025 report by Snowflake, a leading AI Data Cloud company. The report delves into how top marketers are excelling in an evolving landscape shaped by AI, privacy, and data trends. This marks the third consecutive year of Snowflake's Modern Marketing Stack Data report, highlighting the essential technologies and platforms leveraged by marketers. Acxiom's recognition in this report underscores its position as a key player in the industry.

news.headline: Sigma is acknowledged as a leader in Snowflake's report on Modern Marketing Data Stack 2025 for thriving in the evolving digital landscape.
news.summary: In San Francisco, Sigma, a data analytics solution designed for live query on cloud data, has been acknowledged as a leader in the Modern Marketing Data Stack 2025 report. This report, commissioned by Snowflake, a prominent AI Data Cloud company, highlights Sigma's innovative approach to adapting to the changing landscape of digital marketing. Sigma's recognition stems from its recent introduction of the Google Analytics 4 (GA4) template. This move underscores Sigma's commitment to staying at the forefront of technological advancements in marketing.

news.headline: Raiven Capital's Supreet Manchanda to speak at Masters and Robots 2024 conference in Warsaw for 8th year, discussing AI and Transhumanism.
news.summary: Raiven Capital is pleased to announce that Supreet Manchanda, Founding Partner, has been invited to the renowned Masters and Robots 2024 conference for the eighth year in a row. The event will take place in Warsaw and remains at the forefront of discussions on technology, Transhumanism, and the changing realm of AI. Supreet will play a pivotal role at the conference as a keynote speaker, moderator, and masterclass teacher, showcasing his expertise in these fields.

news.headline: Eight high school teams awarded $7500 grants by Lemelson-MIT to develop technological solutions for real-world problems.
news.summary: In Cambridge, Massachusetts, the Lemelson-MIT Program has revealed the 2024-2025 InvenTeams consisting of eight groups composed of high school students, teachers, and mentors nationwide. Each team will be granted $7,500 in funding and will benefit from year-long assistance to develop a technological creation aimed at addressing a specific issue. The projects will reflect real-life challenges noticed within their communities. The selection process for the InvenTeams was rigorous.

news.headline: Cessna Citation Ascend to be delivered with Garmin G5000 avionics in 2025, significant tech advances for pilots. #TextronAviation
news.summary: Textron Aviation has revealed that the Cessna Citation Ascend is advancing smoothly in its certification process and will feature upgrades to the Garmin G5000 avionics suite. Set to be operational by 2025, this advanced flight deck offers pilots cutting-edge technology. Manufactured by Textron Aviation Inc., a subsidiary of Textron Inc. (NYSE: TXT), the Ascend program is on track for its upcoming launch.

news.headline: Corvias in Warwick delivers updated quality assurance program for military housing, improving living conditions and resident satisfaction.
news.summary: In Warwick, Rhode Island, Corvias recently introduced an improved quality assurance program for its military housing properties to enhance living standards and boost resident satisfaction. Developed in partnership with the Army, the initiative focuses on strengthening quality assurance and quality control in daily operations. The program has seen positive results, with improvements noted in work order performance and resident contentment after its implementation earlier this year.

news.headline: EROAD renews partnership with ABC Supply to boost efficiency and safety. ABC Supply - largest distributor in roofing.
news.summary: On October 22, 2024, in San Diego, EROAD revealed the extension of its partnership with ABC Supply Co., Inc., a key distributor of roofing and other building materials. EROAD, a prominent provider of fleet management, electronic compliance, and telematics solutions, reaffirmed its collaboration with ABC Supply Co., Inc., which stands as the leading distributor in its sector.

news.headline: Six Rubin and Rudman partners selected for 2025 Lawdragon 500 Leading Family Lawyers in America.
news.summary: In Boston on October 22, 2024, Marlee S. Cowan, Lisa M. Cukier, Susan B. Grandis, David M. Friedman, Jared D. Spinelli, and Meredith A. Stratford, who are partners at Rubin and Rudman, have been chosen to be part of the 2025 Lawdragon 500 Leading Family Lawyers in America. This prestigious recognition highlights their expertise and skills in the legal field.

news.headline: TollBit, a marketplace for AI firms and publishers, raises $24M in Series A funding led by Lightspeed.
news.summary: TollBit, a tech startup based in New York, has developed a platform that allows AI companies to compensate publishers for real-time access to necessary content. Founders Olivia Joslin and Toshit Panigrahi revealed that the company successfully secured $24 million in Series A funding, with Lightspeed leading the investment round. This influx of capital is expected to fuel TollBit's expansion and further development of its innovative solution.

news.headline: Apollo.io received Inc.'s 2024 Power Partner Award for top B2B companies catering to SMBs, helping companies grow.
news.summary: Every year, a list is compiled to honor the best B2B firms nationwide that serve small and medium-sized businesses. These companies are esteemed for their history of assisting entrepreneurs and facilitating business expansion. In an announcement made on October 22, 2024, in San Francisco, Apollo.io, a prominent sales go-to-market (GTM) platform, was duly recognized for its exemplary performance.

news.headline: Under Canvas to open first Pacific Northwest camp near Mount Hood in Washington, accepting reservations for May 2025.
news.summary: Under Canvas Columbia River Gorge, the inaugural Pacific Northwest site by the upscale outdoor hospitality leader Under Canvas, is scheduled to launch in May 2025. Reservations are currently being accepted for this new location. The announcement was made in Denver on October 22, 2024.

news.headline: First BanCorp (NYSE: FBP) to announce quarterly earnings on 2024-10-23, with expected EPS of $0.41. Bulls anticipate growth.
news.summary: First BanCorp, listed on NYSE as FBP, is set to disclose its quarterly earnings on Wednesday, October 23, 2024. Analysts anticipate the company to reveal an earnings per share (EPS) of $0.41. Investors holding optimistic views on First BanCorp will be eager for the company to surpass this estimate and reveal positive guidance for future growth. The full story can be accessed on Benzinga.com.
